creator: drtr0jan@yandex.ru
text:
(In reply to Alexey Dokuchaev from comment #47)
> you've removed the GNU make support
Why is GNU make need as build deps?

> now have to pass -ldflags by hand, no idea why.
Passing -ldflags by hand is implemented as in go.mk framework.

> You've also replaced one simple stat(1) invocation in _GET_DATE with cryptic combination of date(1), grep(1), and sed(1), how's that an improvement?
As in net-mgmt/prometheus2. But I think, you version is correct. Agreed.

>> Separated vmutils files dir for future rc-scripts (vmalert, etc).
> I'm afraid I did not understand this part.
I suppose vmutils rc-files (vmagent, vmalert) should be in vmutils files dir.

> Please checkout the latest version and let's proceed from there.
Ok, thx. I'll try again later.
